description: Address 5 semantic review findings: fix broken search links (?term= -> ?q=), wire listening history into RecentlyPlayedTracker, strip HTML from album descriptions, add AbortController to drawer fetches, remove console.warn from new personalization functions.
steps: Fix ?term= to ?q= in EmptyFavoriteAlbums, EmptyFavoriteArtists, AlbumRecommendations, ArtistRecommendations, FavoriteAlbumsHero, FavoriteArtistsHero, EmptyInsights. Remove &entity= suffixes.
Wire addHistoryEntry into RecentlyPlayedTracker with session management and preview completion tracking.
Strip HTML tags from album description in AlbumDescription.tsx using regex.
Add AbortController to ArtistDetailsDrawer and AlbumDetailsDrawer fetch useEffects.
Remove console.warn from new listening history functions in lib/personalization.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Listening history is populated when tracks play
Album descriptions have HTML tags stripped
Drawer fetches are aborted on cleanup/rapid switching
No console.warn in addHistoryEntry, removeHistoryEntry, clearHistory, updatePlaybackProgress
bun run lint passes with zero errors
bun run build succeeds with zero errors
verification: Run `bun run lint` and confirm zero errors
Run `bun run build` and confirm successful compilation
